# specialisation

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `specialisation`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `specialisation` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Additional configurations to build. If `inheritParentConfig` is true, the system will be based on the overall system configuration. To switch to a specialised configuration (e.g. `fewJobsManyCores`) at runtime, run: `sudo /run/current-system/specialisation/fewJobsManyCores/bin/switch-to-configuration test` |
| `specialisation.<name>.configuration` | `submodule` | Arbitrary NixOS configuration. Anything you can add to a normal NixOS configuration, you can add here, including imports and config values, although nested specialisations will be ignored. |
| `specialisation.<name>.inheritParentConfig` | `boolean` | Include the entire system's configuration. Set to false to make a completely differently configured system. |
